texto: That will solve nothing, my lord.” His wife strode into the kitchen, stiff pride shining in her eyes. “I told you to keep her in hand.” Brodick glared at his cousin, wondering just when his life had turned inside out. Druce scowled at the sweet smile Brodrick’s wife cast toward him. He lifted his finger and pointed at her. “She bit me.
explicacao: Citação de Mary Wine sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “That will solve nothing, my lord.” His wife strode into the kitchen, stiff pride shining in her e…” articula humor, bite, pride em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como humor e pride.
